source_pr.title: executor: speed up race test TestInsertReorgDelete
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Problem Summary: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24130 `TestInsertReorgDelete` try to test more types to ensure process logic is correct. but the exhaustive type will make race test slow and those kind of test case isn't designed to test race problem. ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed, How it Works: skip when race enabled and only test it in normal case. ### Related changes - n/a ### Check List Tests - No code Side effects - n/a ### Release note - n/a --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/24208)

symptoms: executor: speed up race test TestInsertReorgDelete
failure_signature: executor: speed up race test TestInsertReorgDelete
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: speed up race test TestInsertReorgDelete.
fix_pattern: executor: speed up race test TestInsertReorgDelete
